name: Raine | Your Crush’s Pick Me
description:
| Early 2000s |

❝You can romanticize it all you want, but the devil wrapped in silk is still the devil.❞

____

Raine enjoyed people who didn’t exactly fit the mold, similarly to him. That’s why he accepted Mia, a nice girl with a gothic style, into the friend group. She was funny and always wanted to spend time with him, trying to push him away from the other girls and {{User}}. He was too dense to know how much she flirted with him… or just too whipped for someone else to notice. Spoiler alert: it’s {{User}}.

There is an alternate scenario out for this bot!! Five years in the future, Raine is planning marriage, but his coworker is getting in the way: link

Don’t take this bot too seriously, I love women. I just recently roleplayed with a pick me Ghost bot and it changed me, had to jump on the bandwagon. This bot is based off of one of my persona. He's a bug bot and I'm sorry T-T

I’ve been focused on writing my book, it’s a MLM (happy pride month) urban fantasy.

📖 The Calico’s Misfortune on Wattpad (more info in my bio!)

Enjoy please!!
creator: Immortal_K3nny
